members.name: AddHr
members.signature: public void AddHr(int width, int height, Color color, int alignment, bool widthInPercent, bool heightInPercent)
members.summary: Adds a horizontal rule that can be used to separate content. If [param width_in_percent] is set, [param width] values are percentages of the control width instead of pixels. If [param height_in_percent] is set, [param height] values are percentages of the control width instead of pixels.

members.name: AddImage
members.signature: public void AddImage(Texture2D image, float width, float height, Color color, int inlineAlign, Rect2 region, Variant key, bool pad, String tooltip, int widthUnit, int heightUnit, String altText)
members.summary: Adds an image's opening and closing tags to the tag stack, optionally providing a [param width] and [param height] to resize the image, a [param color] to tint the image and a [param region] to only use parts of the image. If [param width] or [param height] is set to 0, the image size will be adjusted in order to keep the original aspect ratio. If [param width] and [param height] are not set, but [param region] is, the region's rect will be used. [param key] is an optional identifier, that can be used to modify the image via [method update_image]. If [param pad] is set, and the image is smaller than the size specified by [param width] and [param height], the image padding is added to match the size instead of upscaling. Parameters [param width_unit] and [param height_unit] determine the units used to calculate the image width and height, respectively. [param alt_text] is used as the image description for assistive apps.

members.name: AddText
members.summary: Adds raw non-BBCode-parsed text to the tag stack.

members.name: AppendText
members.summary: Parses [param bbcode] and adds tags to the tag stack as needed. [b]Note:[/b] Using this method, you can't close a tag that was opened in a previous [method append_text] call. This is done to improve performance, especially when updating large RichTextLabels since rebuilding the whole BBCode every time would be slower. If you absolutely need to close a tag in a future method call, append the [member text] instead of using [method append_text].

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Clears the tag stack, causing the label to display nothing. [b]Note:[/b] This method does not affect [member text], and its contents will show again if the label is redrawn. However, setting [member text] to an empty [String] also clears the stack.

members.name: Deselect
members.summary: Clears the current selection.

members.name: GetCharacterLine
members.summary: Returns the line number of the character position provided. Line and character numbers are both zero-indexed. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetCharacterParagraph
members.summary: Returns the paragraph number of the character position provided. Paragraph and character numbers are both zero-indexed. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetContentHeight
members.summary: Returns the height of the content. [b]Note:[/b] This method always returns the full content size, and is not affected by [member visible_ratio] and [member visible_characters]. To get the visible content size, use [method get_visible_content_rect]. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetContentWidth
members.summary: Returns the width of the content. [b]Note:[/b] This method always returns the full content size, and is not affected by [member visible_ratio] and [member visible_characters]. To get the visible content size, use [method get_visible_content_rect]. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetLineCount
members.summary: Returns the total number of lines in the text. Wrapped text is counted as multiple lines. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetLineHeight
members.summary: Returns the height of the line found at the provided index. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether the document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetLineOffset
members.summary: Returns the vertical offset of the line found at the provided index. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetLineRange
members.summary: Returns the indexes of the first and last visible characters for the given [param line], as a [Vector2i]. [b]Note:[/b] If [member visible_characters_behavior] is set to [constant TextServer.VC_CHARS_BEFORE_SHAPING] only visible wrapped lines are counted. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetLineWidth
members.summary: Returns the width of the line found at the provided index. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether the document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetMenu
members.summary: Returns the [PopupMenu] of this [RichTextLabel]. By default, this menu is displayed when right-clicking on the [RichTextLabel]. You can add custom menu items or remove standard ones. Make sure your IDs don't conflict with the standard ones (see [enum MenuItems]). For example: [codeblocks] [gdscript] func _ready(): var menu = get_menu() # Remove "Select All" item. menu.remove_item(MENU_SELECT_ALL) # Add custom items. menu.add_separator() menu.add_item("Duplicate Text", MENU_MAX + 1) # Connect callback. menu.id_pressed.connect(_on_item_pressed) func _on_item_pressed(id): if id == MENU_MAX + 1: add_text("\n" + get_parsed_text()) [/gdscript] [csharp] public override void _Ready() { var menu = GetMenu(); // Remove "Select All" item. menu.RemoveItem(RichTextLabel.MenuItems.SelectAll); // Add custom items. menu.AddSeparator(); menu.AddItem("Duplicate Text", RichTextLabel.MenuItems.Max + 1); // Add event handler. menu.IdPressed += OnItemPressed; } public void OnItemPressed(int id) { if (id == TextEdit.MenuItems.Max + 1) { AddText("\n" + GetParsedText()); } } [/csharp] [/codeblocks] [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: GetParagraphCount
members.summary: Returns the total number of paragraphs (newlines or [code]p[/code] tags in the tag stack's text tags). Considers wrapped text as one paragraph.

members.name: GetParagraphOffset
members.summary: Returns the vertical offset of the paragraph found at the provided index. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetParsedText
members.summary: Returns the text without BBCode mark-up.

members.name: GetSelectedText
members.summary: Returns the current selection text. Does not include BBCodes.

members.name: GetSelectionFrom
members.summary: Returns the current selection first character index if a selection is active, [code]-1[/code] otherwise. Does not include BBCodes.

members.name: GetSelectionLineOffset
members.summary: Returns the current selection vertical line offset if a selection is active, [code]-1.0[/code] otherwise.

members.name: GetSelectionTo
members.summary: Returns the current selection last character index if a selection is active, [code]-1[/code] otherwise. Does not include BBCodes.

members.name: GetTotalCharacterCount
members.summary: Returns the total number of characters from text tags. Does not include BBCodes.

members.name: GetVScrollBar
members.summary: Returns the vertical scrollbar. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member CanvasItem.visible] property.

members.name: GetVisibleContentRect
members.summary: Returns the bounding rectangle of the visible content. [b]Note:[/b] This method returns a correct value only after the label has been drawn. [codeblocks] [gdscript] extends RichTextLabel @export var background_panel: Panel func _ready(): await draw background_panel.position = get_visible_content_rect().position background_panel.size = get_visible_content_rect().size [/gdscript] [csharp] public partial class TestLabel : RichTextLabel { [Export] public Panel BackgroundPanel { get; set; } public override async void _Ready() { await ToSignal(this, Control.SignalName.Draw); BackgroundGPanel.Position = GetVisibleContentRect().Position; BackgroundPanel.Size = GetVisibleContentRect().Size; } } [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: GetVisibleLineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of visible lines. [b]Note:[/b] This method returns a correct value only after the label has been drawn. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: GetVisibleParagraphCount
members.summary: Returns the number of visible paragraphs. A paragraph is considered visible if at least one of its lines is visible. [b]Note:[/b] This method returns a correct value only after the label has been drawn. [b]Note:[/b] If [member threaded] is enabled, this method returns a value for the loaded part of the document. Use [method is_finished] or [signal finished] to determine whether document is fully loaded.

members.name: InstallEffect
members.summary: Installs a custom effect. This can also be done in the Inspector through the [member custom_effects] property. [param effect] should be a valid [RichTextEffect]. [b]Example:[/b] With the following script extending from [RichTextEffect]: [codeblock] # effect.gd class_name MyCustomEffect extends RichTextEffect var bbcode = "my_custom_effect" # ... [/codeblock] The above effect can be installed in [RichTextLabel] from a script: [codeblock] # rich_text_label.gd extends RichTextLabel func _ready(): install_effect(MyCustomEffect.new()) # Alternatively, if not using `class_name` in the script that extends RichTextEffect: install_effect(preload("res://effect.gd").new()) [/codeblock]

members.name: InvalidateParagraph
members.summary: Invalidates [param paragraph] and all subsequent paragraphs cache.

members.name: IsFinished
members.summary: If [member threaded] is enabled, returns [code]true[/code] if the background thread has finished text processing, otherwise always return [code]true[/code].

members.name: IsMenuVisible
members.summary: Returns whether the menu is visible. Use this instead of [code]get_menu().visible[/code] to improve performance (so the creation of the menu is avoided).

members.name: IsReady
members.summary: If [member threaded] is enabled, returns [code]true[/code] if the background thread has finished text processing, otherwise always return [code]true[/code].

members.name: MenuOption
members.summary: Executes a given action as defined in the [enum MenuItems] enum.

members.name: Newline
members.summary: Adds a newline tag to the tag stack.

members.name: ParseBbcode
members.summary: The assignment version of [method append_text]. Clears the tag stack and inserts the new content.

members.name: ParseExpressionsForValues
members.summary: Parses BBCode parameter [param expressions] into a dictionary.

members.name: Pop
members.summary: Terminates the current tag. Use after [code]push_*[/code] methods to close BBCodes manually. Does not need to follow [code]add_*[/code] methods.

members.name: PopAll
members.summary: Terminates all tags opened by [code]push_*[/code] methods.

members.name: PopContext
members.summary: Terminates tags opened after the last [method push_context] call (including context marker), or all tags if there's no context marker on the stack.

members.name: PushBgcolor
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][bgcolor][/code] tag to the tag stack. [b]Note:[/b] The background color has padding applied by default, which is controlled using [theme_item text_highlight_h_padding] and [theme_item text_highlight_v_padding]. This can lead to overlapping highlights if background colors are placed on neighboring lines/columns, so consider setting those theme items to [code]0[/code] if you want to avoid this.

members.name: PushBold
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag with a bold font to the tag stack. This is the same as adding a [code skip-lint][b][/code] tag if not currently in a [code skip-lint][i][/code] tag.

members.name: PushBoldItalics
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag with a bold italics font to the tag stack.

members.name: PushCell
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][cell][/code] tag to the tag stack. Must be inside a [code skip-lint][table][/code] tag. See [method push_table] for details. Use [method set_table_column_expand] to set column expansion ratio, [method set_cell_border_color] to set cell border, [method set_cell_row_background_color] to set cell background, [method set_cell_size_override] to override cell size, and [method set_cell_padding] to set padding.

members.name: PushColor
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][color][/code] tag to the tag stack.

members.name: PushContext
members.summary: Adds a context marker to the tag stack. See [method pop_context].

members.name: PushCustomfx
members.signature: public void PushCustomfx(RichTextEffect effect, Dictionary env)
members.summary: Adds a custom effect tag to the tag stack. The effect does not need to be in [member custom_effects]. The environment is directly passed to the effect.

members.name: PushDropcap
members.signature: public void PushDropcap(String @string, Font font, int size, Rect2 dropcapMargins, Color color, int outlineSize, Color outlineColor)
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][dropcap][/code] tag to the tag stack. Drop cap (dropped capital) is a decorative element at the beginning of a paragraph that is larger than the rest of the text.

members.name: PushFgcolor
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][fgcolor][/code] tag to the tag stack. [b]Note:[/b] The foreground color has padding applied by default, which is controlled using [theme_item text_highlight_h_padding] and [theme_item text_highlight_v_padding]. This can lead to overlapping highlights if foreground colors are placed on neighboring lines/columns, so consider setting those theme items to [code]0[/code] if you want to avoid this.

members.name: PushFont
members.signature: public void PushFont(Font font, int fontSize)
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag to the tag stack. Overrides default fonts for its duration. Passing [code]0[/code] to [param font_size] will use the existing default font size.

members.name: PushFontSize
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font_size][/code] tag to the tag stack. Overrides default font size for its duration.

members.name: PushHint
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][hint][/code] tag to the tag stack. Same as BBCode [code skip-lint][hint=something]{text}[/hint][/code].

members.name: PushIndent
members.summary: Adds an [code skip-lint][indent][/code] tag to the tag stack. Multiplies [param level] by current [member tab_size] to determine new margin length.

members.name: PushItalics
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag with an italics font to the tag stack. This is the same as adding an [code skip-lint][i][/code] tag if not currently in a [code skip-lint][b][/code] tag.

members.name: PushLanguage
members.summary: Adds language code used for text shaping algorithm and Open-Type font features.

members.name: PushList
members.signature: public void PushList(int level, int type, bool capitalize, String bullet)
members.summary: Adds [code skip-lint][ol][/code] or [code skip-lint][ul][/code] tag to the tag stack. Multiplies [param level] by current [member tab_size] to determine new margin length.

members.name: PushMeta
members.signature: public void PushMeta(Variant data, int underlineMode, String tooltip)
members.summary: Adds a meta tag to the tag stack. Similar to the BBCode [code skip-lint][url=something]{text}[/url][/code], but supports non-[String] metadata types. If [member meta_underlined] is [code]true[/code], meta tags display an underline. This behavior can be customized with [param underline_mode]. [b]Note:[/b] Meta tags do nothing by default when clicked. To assign behavior when clicked, connect [signal meta_clicked] to a function that is called when the meta tag is clicked.

members.name: PushMono
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag with a monospace font to the tag stack.

members.name: PushNormal
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][font][/code] tag with a normal font to the tag stack.

members.name: PushOutlineColor
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][outline_color][/code] tag to the tag stack. Adds text outline for its duration.

members.name: PushOutlineSize
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][outline_size][/code] tag to the tag stack. Overrides default text outline size for its duration.

members.name: PushParagraph
members.signature: public void PushParagraph(int alignment, int baseDirection, String language, int stParser, int justificationFlags, PackedFloat32Array tabStops)
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][p][/code] tag to the tag stack.

members.name: PushStrikethrough
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][s][/code] tag to the tag stack. If [param color]'s alpha value is [code]0.0[/code], the current font's color with its alpha multiplied by [theme_item strikethrough_alpha] is used.

members.name: PushTable
members.signature: public void PushTable(int columns, int inlineAlign, int alignToRow, String name)
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][table=columns,inline_align][/code] tag to the tag stack. Use [method set_table_column_expand] to set column expansion ratio. Use [method push_cell] to add cells. [param name] is used as the table name for assistive apps.

members.name: PushUnderline
members.summary: Adds a [code skip-lint][u][/code] tag to the tag stack. If [param color]'s alpha value is [code]0.0[/code], the current font's color with its alpha multiplied by [theme_item underline_alpha] is used.

members.name: ReloadEffects
members.summary: Reloads custom effects. Useful when [member custom_effects] is modified manually.

members.name: RemoveParagraph
members.signature: public bool RemoveParagraph(int paragraph, bool noInvalidate)
members.summary: Removes a paragraph of content from the label. Returns [code]true[/code] if the paragraph exists. The [param paragraph] argument is the index of the paragraph to remove, it can take values in the interval [code][0, get_paragraph_count() - 1][/code]. If [param no_invalidate] is set to [code]true[/code], cache for the subsequent paragraphs is not invalidated. Use it for faster updates if deleted paragraph is fully self-contained (have no unclosed tags), or this call is part of the complex edit operation and [method invalidate_paragraph] will be called at the end of operation.

members.name: ScrollToLine
members.summary: Scrolls the window's top line to match [param line].

members.name: ScrollToParagraph
members.summary: Scrolls the window's top line to match first line of the [param paragraph].

members.name: ScrollToSelection
members.summary: Scrolls to the beginning of the current selection.

members.name: SelectAll
members.summary: Select all the text. If [member selection_enabled] is [code]false[/code], no selection will occur.

members.name: SetCellBorderColor
members.summary: Sets color of a table cell border.

members.name: SetCellPadding
members.summary: Sets inner padding of a table cell.

members.name: SetCellRowBackgroundColor
members.signature: public void SetCellRowBackgroundColor(Color oddRowBg, Color evenRowBg)
members.summary: Sets color of a table cell. Separate colors for alternating rows can be specified.

members.name: SetCellSizeOverride
members.signature: public void SetCellSizeOverride(Vector2 minSize, Vector2 maxSize)
members.summary: Sets minimum and maximum size overrides for a table cell.

members.name: SetTableColumnExpand
members.signature: public void SetTableColumnExpand(int column, bool expand, int ratio, bool shrink)
members.summary: Edits the selected column's expansion options. If [param expand] is [code]true[/code], the column expands in proportion to its expansion ratio versus the other columns' ratios. For example, 2 columns with ratios 3 and 4 plus 70 pixels in available width would expand 30 and 40 pixels, respectively. If [param expand] is [code]false[/code], the column will not contribute to the total ratio.

members.name: SetTableColumnName
members.signature: public void SetTableColumnName(int column, String name)
members.summary: Sets table column name for assistive apps.

members.name: UpdateImage
members.signature: public void UpdateImage(Variant key, int mask, Texture2D image, float width, float height, Color color, int inlineAlign, Rect2 region, bool pad, String tooltip, int widthUnit, int heightUnit)
members.summary: Updates the existing images with the key [param key]. Only properties specified by [param mask] bits are updated. See [method add_image].

members.name: AutowrapMode
members.summary: If set to something other than [constant TextServer.AUTOWRAP_OFF], the text gets wrapped inside the node's bounding rectangle. [b]Note:[/b] RichTextLabels with autowrapping and [member fit_content] enabled must have a custom maximum width configured to work correctly, either through the RichTextLabel's own [member Control.custom_maximum_size] or as a result of a propagated maximum size from a parent Control with [member Control.propagate_maximum_size] enabled.

members.name: AutowrapTrimFlags
members.summary: Autowrap space trimming flags. See [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_START_EDGE_SPACES] and [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_END_EDGE_SPACES] for more info.

members.name: BbcodeEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the label uses BBCode formatting. [b]Note:[/b] This only affects the contents of [member text], not the tag stack.

members.name: ContextMenuEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], a right-click displays the context menu.

members.name: CustomEffects
members.summary: The currently installed custom effects. This is an array of [RichTextEffect]s. To add a custom effect, it's more convenient to use [method install_effect].

members.name: DeselectOnFocusLossEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the selected text will be deselected when focus is lost.

members.name: DragAndDropSelectionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], allow drag and drop of selected text.

members.name: FitContent
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the label's minimum size will be automatically updated to fit its content, matching the behavior of [Label]. [b]Note:[/b] RichTextLabels with autowrapping and [member fit_content] enabled must have a custom maximum width configured to work correctly, either through the RichTextLabel's own [member Control.custom_maximum_size] or as a result of a propagated maximum size from a parent Control with [member Control.propagate_maximum_size] enabled.

members.name: HintUnderlined
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the label underlines hint tags such as [code skip-lint][hint=description]{text}[/hint][/code].

members.name: HorizontalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's horizontal alignment. Supports left, center, right, and fill (also known as justify).

members.name: JustificationFlags
members.summary: Line fill alignment rules.

members.name: Language
members.summary: Language code used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If left empty, the current locale is used instead.

members.name: MetaUnderlined
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the label underlines meta tags such as [code skip-lint][url]{text}[/url][/code]. These tags can call a function when clicked if [signal meta_clicked] is connected to a function.

members.name: ProgressBarDelay
members.summary: The delay after which the loading progress bar is displayed, in milliseconds. Set to [code]-1[/code] to disable progress bar entirely. [b]Note:[/b] Progress bar is displayed only if [member threaded] is enabled.

members.name: ScrollActive
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the scrollbar is visible. Setting this to [code]false[/code] does not block scrolling completely. See [method scroll_to_line].

members.name: ScrollFollowing
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the window scrolls down to display new content automatically.

members.name: ScrollFollowingVisibleCharacters
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the window scrolls to display the last visible line when [member visible_characters] or [member visible_ratio] is changed.

members.name: SelectionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the label allows text selection.

members.name: ShortcutKeysEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shortcut keys for context menu items are enabled, even if the context menu is disabled.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override.

members.name: TabSize
members.summary: The number of spaces associated with a single tab length. Does not affect [code]\t[/code] in text tags, only indent tags.

members.name: TabStops
members.summary: Aligns text to the given tab-stops.

members.name: Text
members.summary: The label's text in BBCode format. Is not representative of manual modifications to the internal tag stack. Erases changes made by other methods when edited. [b]Note:[/b] If [member bbcode_enabled] is [code]true[/code], it is unadvised to use the [code]+=[/code] operator with [member text] (e.g. [code]text += "some string"[/code]) as it replaces the whole text and can cause slowdowns. It will also erase all BBCode that was added to stack using [code]push_*[/code] methods. Use [method append_text] for adding text instead, unless you absolutely need to close a tag that was opened in an earlier method call.

members.name: TextDirection
members.summary: Base text writing direction.

members.name: Threaded
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], text processing is done in a background thread.

members.name: VerticalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's vertical alignment. Supports top, center, bottom, and fill.

members.name: VisibleCharacters
members.summary: The number of characters to display. If set to [code]-1[/code], all characters are displayed. This can be useful when animating the text appearing in a dialog box. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property updates [member visible_ratio] accordingly. [b]Note:[/b] Characters are counted as Unicode codepoints. A single visible grapheme may contain multiple codepoints (e.g. certain emoji use three codepoints). A single codepoint may contain two UTF-16 characters, which are used in C# strings.

members.name: VisibleCharactersBehavior
members.summary: The clipping behavior when [member visible_characters] or [member visible_ratio] is set.

members.name: VisibleRatio
members.summary: The fraction of characters to display, relative to the total number of characters (see [method get_total_character_count]). If set to [code]1.0[/code], all characters are displayed. If set to [code]0.5[/code], only half of the characters will be displayed. This can be useful when animating the text appearing in a dialog box. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property updates [member visible_characters] accordingly.

signals.name: Finished
signals.summary: Triggered when the document is fully loaded. [b]Note:[/b] This can happen before the text is processed for drawing. Scrolling values may not be valid until the document is drawn for the first time after this signal.

signals.name: MetaClicked
signals.summary: Triggered when the user clicks on content between meta (URL) tags. If the meta is defined in BBCode, e.g. [code skip-lint][url={"key": "value"}]Text[/url][/code], then the parameter for this signal will always be a [String] type. If a particular type or an object is desired, the [method push_meta] method must be used to manually insert the data into the tag stack. Alternatively, you can convert the [String] input to the desired type based on its contents (such as calling [method JSON.parse] on it). For example, the following method can be connected to [signal meta_clicked] to open clicked URLs using the user's default web browser: [codeblocks] [gdscript] # This assumes RichTextLabel's `meta_clicked` signal was connected to # the function below using the signal connection dialog. func _richtextlabel_on_meta_clicked(meta): # `meta` is of Variant type, so convert it to a String to avoid script errors at run-time. OS.shell_open(str(meta)) [/gdscript] [/codeblocks]

signals.name: MetaHoverEnded
signals.summary: Triggers when the mouse exits a meta tag.

signals.name: MetaHoverStarted
signals.summary: Triggers when the mouse enters a meta tag.

values.name: IMAGE_UNIT_EM
values.summary: Images drawn with this unit will be in percentages of the surrounding font size.

values.name: IMAGE_UNIT_PERCENT

values.summary: Copies the selected text.

values.name: MENU_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum MenuItems] enum.

values.name: MENU_SELECT_ALL
values.summary: Selects the whole [RichTextLabel] text.

values.name: META_UNDERLINE_ALWAYS
values.summary: If [member meta_underlined] is [code]true[/code], meta tag always display an underline.

values.name: META_UNDERLINE_NEVER
values.summary: Meta tag does not display an underline, even if [member meta_underlined] is [code]true[/code].

values.name: META_UNDERLINE_ON_HOVER
values.summary: If [member meta_underlined] is [code]true[/code], meta tag display an underline when the mouse cursor is over it.
